customManagers.description: Monitor the Temurin JRE version baked into the Dockerfile (ESUMs/URLs still need manual sync)

packageRules.description: Only open PRs for minor and patch updates (no major)
JRE: monitor only via dashboard - renovate cannot update the coupled ESUMs/URLs, so do the full sync by hand
Ignore Siddhi (EOL, unpatchable) and wagon-ssh-external (being removed) - no updates at all

camel.version is a shared Maven property driving BOTH org.apache.camel.karaf:apache-camel (the Karaf features descriptor, which lags) and base org.apache.camel:* artifacts. Disable base-camel updates so the shared property tracks ONLY camel-karaf (https://github.com/apache/camel-karaf) and never exceeds the version the Karaf features actually publish (base camel-core is already ahead, e.g. 4.21 while camel-karaf tops out at 4.18.2). When camel-karaf releases a new version, Renovate bumps the property automatically.
janusgraph-driver publishes only timestamped dev builds past 1.1.0 (e.g. 1.2.0-20250607-200526.4379014); accept only clean X.Y.Z releases
